misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 In the matchup between Imu and Loki, Loki is clearly at a disadvantage. Yes, he has power and a strong Devil Fruit, but and this will play a huge role, because he's so big, I don't think
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 In the matchup between Imu and Loki, Loki is clearly at a disadvantage. Yes, he has power and a strong Devil Fruit, but and this will play a huge role, because he's so big, I don't think he'll have the speed to keep up with Imu's insane speed. Under normal circumstances, that should be the case, but I think especially in hybrid form, we could see a surprise. Like Thor, Loki might use his Devil Fruit power to create a Lightning Cloak around himself and move with massive speed, allowing him to match Imu's speed and agility. I'm really excited, as I also think Loki will fight Imu together with Luffy.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Of course we wait for Marco/Sandman/Viz translation too but this is what PuckTheGreat(Worstgen user who always translate) posted: Chopper: Zoro!! Quick! Get him into the building!! Chopp
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Of course we wait for Marco/Sandman/Viz translation too but this is what PuckTheGreat(Worstgen user who always translate) posted: Chopper: Zoro!! Quick! Get him into the building!! Chopper: Everyone please gather all those that are either injured or collapsed!! Broccoli Blade 🥦 (@Broccoli_Blade) We literally see chopper asking zoro to bring all the injured to him. Zoro is fine. Learn to read 😂 — https://nitter.net/Broccoli_Blade/status/2044679539587272993#m

misc.title: Good, slow, controlled reps with a squeeze! Next time you do these, try this and I know it should a little crazy. as you press down, focus on pushing the EZ bar more with your pinky and ring fingers.
misc.text: Good, slow, controlled reps with a squeeze! Next time you do these, try this and I know it should a little crazy. as you press down, focus on pushing the EZ bar more with your pinky and ring fingers. I know, sounds crazy but trust me, it works and you'll feel it in the tricep.

misc.title: Contrary to pop. belief the first print of #ONEPIECE 's one-shot(s) in JUMP and spin-off mags are not very rare. THIS is the holy grail. 1993 Oda's first publication in JUMP as an author 'Future Prese
misc.text: Contrary to pop. belief the first print of #ONEPIECE 's one-shot(s) in JUMP and spin-off mags are not very rare. THIS is the holy grail. 1993 Oda's first publication in JUMP as an author 'Future Present From God'. Rare AF! I have my pristine copy. If you find yours, NEVER let go.

items.text: #ONEPIECE1180 In the matchup between Imu and Loki, Loki is clearly at a disadvantage. Yes, he has power and a strong Devil Fruit, but and this will play a huge role, because he's so big, I don't think he'll have the speed to keep up with Imu's insane speed. Under normal circumstances, that should be the case, but I think especially in hybrid form, we could see a surprise. Like Thor, Loki might use his Devil Fruit power to create a Lightning Cloak around himself and move with massive speed, allowing him to match Imu's speed and agility. I'm really excited, as I also think Loki will fight Imu together with Luffy.
